speaker: Sam Schrager
words: ...has written a book of her childhood recollections called Coming West from South Dakota and is working on a companion volume that will go from the 8th grade to her marriage. Her writing is rich in personal and family anecdotes and show what pioneer life was like. So was this conversation, which looks further at some of the whys and wherefores in Coming West from South Dakota. At the end, Mrs. Fleener recalls some of what her father -in -law, Dave Fleener, told her about his crossing the plains at the age of four in 1852.
